steps.t: The healer has made for Gladion's home in Dínadab in order to assist the wounded Fuirion. You should run after the healer to see if you can be of any …
Fuirion's family -- brother, sister-in-law, niece, and nephew -- are in Gladion's home in Dínadab, anxiously looking on. You should speak with the fam…
The healer is in Gladion's home in Dínadab in order to assist the wounded Fuirion. You should speak with the healer again.
Bandage linens can be found hanging outside the shop. Kingsfoil grows wild in the fields around Dínadab. You should collect kingsfoil and bandage line…
The apothecary shop is in southern Dínadab in northern Lamedon. You should bring the supplies to the shop.
Fuirion is in Gladion's home in Dínadab. You should question Fuirion about his wounds.
